name: Team Bloomberg
subject: Are you still in to defeat Donald Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
Supporters like you will be the most influential players in this election.

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=b77555d91b7b4d74b98e71297a2303ab&_e=cuGEImCZfkCWw1ly2AjgIqrtnZsCIDdzgKh7zJ8FicxjOCCB7dwEGz5NEsL-_q1EjKa2yy-OfQpotXMn6fEPshKb159lXe4cO1iZoz4OYA_rSFI2Gla4C2_XOJi6FLrHLyIJkMpLSJPhBsTnT-Qxj9aU5m81B6j8im3BqSKgNeAMkdaA0iqOVjIu6jM3K0pLzcX9NwcFff8BpVZHcoRMF5fg48cLyiOkS9zGiGMhru8UfOrm5fai-DFhTSkm9Pg99NprAYVgmj8jvzf8Js_cXA%3D%3D) _Before you read on, you can let us know you're still in to defeat Trump in 2020:_ | [I'M IN »](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=b77555d91b7b4d74b98e71297a2303ab&_e=pEn8BGvC0bkGp-T-69JKfaIAXZ_x31wyf0LzpJvcFJK0hKnl8bjF-lcz5cG07kyU6a8la_wUNI2Ws5AidRrAIZWImEZ63OrZ1gcZEzWBW_EJNMMBFXGVXyJcR16tfiGrlBdXcmjzkX_Ilg1x-L1MRuB6A9BnnJvo_U8D-EPSdgGg3gVd581rqIp5_MKaxkyCgQH0XZh7umhibh4x4AXSgiewIUC_uxz-oMZW80aL6v1ka0LxhZ6tJaM3X3XLxpezKujPYkACc5M1ubeDZdO11Jz0bSmCww1iQZAwteb87wvk6grgNqQHgWTtp5YekjpW5gJ6LTYohUHfnETEBfgYKxw1UUm-6REmv_jyxKaSYK6zynS1hc5xfRhnuNOXE3kf)
---
Friend --
A lot has happened since we last emailed you. But we're still here, and while we're no longer running a presidential campaign, we're hardly going to take a backseat in this election.
Our most important goal remains defeating Donald Trump. So we're going to spend the rest of the election trying to do just that. We're still in. Are you?
**Add your name to say you're still in to defeat Trump in 2020:[https://mikebloomberg.com/2020/em-defeat-trump-survey](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=b77555d91b7b4d74b98e71297a2303ab&_e=pEn8BGvC0bkGp-T-69JKfaIAXZ_x31wyf0LzpJvcFJK0hKnl8bjF-lcz5cG07kyU6a8la_wUNI2Ws5AidRrAIZWImEZ63OrZ1gcZEzWBW_EJNMMBFXGVXyJcR16tfiGrlBdXcmjzkX_Ilg1x-L1MRuB6A9BnnJvo_U8D-EPSdgEwm9H0k8AYPjUqxbwy6TbSTCy-vC4px0KBC2KBTi0G6JAV-aA8A5q3ttOv7L17cyMQ6NygBJtMnzbgiMqZPGYL-1v5T88o2xvufdyoxw1zdaxh-gMuf_k4kIddSJrzx0CiiZy5_-_Ta7UAzR_SxXNADFNY7qaXR00LmdRBlOv_YcR3l4scjcmMWyoLc2Bq_FgwskWe63zdDng99JXhg1dw)**
America deserves a president who can bring our country back together and put us back on track. That won't happen on its own -- and it won't happen without our continued investment of time, resources, commitment, and our own networks.
That means that in the days and months ahead, we'll need to transform our grassroots network of supporters into some of the most influential players in this election. So:
* We'll call on you to learn about Trump's record and share information with the folks you know.
* We'll ask you to take action in key states and districts, and brush up on the most important issues facing America today.
* We'll ask you to combat smears and disinformation, and spread the truth about what Democrats have planned to rebuild America.

It'll be hard work, but it'll pay off in November, when we make history.
This is the most important election of our lifetimes -- so what do you say? Are you in to make Trump a one-term president?
[**Add your name, and let's get it done.**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=b77555d91b7b4d74b98e71297a2303ab&_e=pEn8BGvC0bkGp-T-69JKfaIAXZ_x31wyf0LzpJvcFJK0hKnl8bjF-lcz5cG07kyU6a8la_wUNI2Ws5AidRrAIZWImEZ63OrZ1gcZEzWBW_EJNMMBFXGVXyJcR16tfiGrlBdXcmjzkX_Ilg1x-L1MRuB6A9BnnJvo_U8D-EPSdgGIgzzcx4W_ZN7Y143h-KjCQFXssvsc_tP03U9ChmKz80RRBXee-H34D0IP0b7JHDG1SbFW8gok-sg1nFeLQO1IZExLHcUEGnq-5FVExxi-j93XEWRksaDUnnto9YaAPWQY6c1HxmhG5Mcx-1bsNZoqq6MbwbnDrgXbev2769-kbETS20IxSmpBu5CI_268HGctWgWTsZw7iRsjFZhYLg2Q)
Break's over.
\- Team Bloomberg

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=b77555d91b7b4d74b98e71297a2303ab&_e=cuGEImCZfkCWw1ly2AjgIvO-s0dEqxjqpmXZh1RmFkdPTXjv5OUkxrhNAuRnlwPrzCDpqx1h7P1od08_jLZ9kOskHjCrcBbSo-yVhayN2_utqthU1F_v99FnQUd6Xf_DIUSGN_2GZstq2HVp5ICRAJ9c9otx3DDq2etb92_CEHZd-q9-0VlZYUbryVhUGodhNyKsajq3L-HKD6usrveG1w-fb5ziy-z1nflMQsd2rMugRTraSBjlkZ_k_Wt6mOKiUoGeAB3jF8NTHRoiq-fFUA%3D%3D) | | [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=b77555d91b7b4d74b98e71297a2303ab&_e=cuGEImCZfkCWw1ly2AjgIsqYmY_bglBx4c4KYw804ARaeZgJCSGJXIsREhUWCycVqj25rLIl_PLxDEZGp92JHXcPINrEhecS_U0lhXMxDYOtfLDKuUfKibUEPPtcJalFBW8UZxajBdH5975h9BGJBD-UTWXVQUjhCVm3DuGpUhAPBvzUUFydeHNqLYgIVhkL80jqRjfcGkvi0qrFwSBizj4GltIQtv9ze3Km58GxUlkXFW-aootNeYG_QGVWAg9yStF1TC5ELl0AlvatYvc5ZQ%3D%3D)

name: Team Kennedy
subject: $3.33 for JK3
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390073/55b66746/23031100/80e3b05/1813859789/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | | **Pitch in $3.33 for JK3** [Donate $3.33](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390073/55b66746/23031100/80e3b06/1813859789/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-03-09-three&recurring=1&amount=3.33")
---
Here's why your contribution is so important at this critical point of our campaign:
* **Weather will be getting better, so it's time to start knocking doors - **We need to ensure we have resources to give every Kennedy supporter stickers and lawn signs. We need to provide every potential supporter literature that explains Joe's message. And we must make sure we are able to hire more organizing staff, ensuring we can reach every single voter in Massachusetts.
* **Attention is shifting to our race - **As we are sure you are aware, we just passed Super Tuesday, which included the Massachusetts Presidential Primary. Now that it's wrapped up, all eyes will be on this Senate race and we need to make sure we are prepared to win on all fronts.
* **The first quarter of the year ends in 22 days - **because of grassroots supporters like you, we raised more than our opponent last quarter. But in order to continue our show of momentum, we have to do it again. And do it big.

[**Now that you know the challenge ahead of us, will you pitch in $3.33 to ensure we have the resources necessary to succeed?**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390073/55b66746/23031100/80e3b06/1813859789/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-03-09-three&recurring=1&amount=3.33")
With you on our team, we know we can succeed. All in.
-Team Kennedy

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390073/55b66746/23031100/80e3b07/1813859789/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.
PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I'm counting on you, everyone (Montana update)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I'll be quick, everyone,
**Governor Steve Bullock just announced that he 's running for Senate in Montana. **Democrats need to net just _four_ seats to end Mitch McConnell's tenure as majority leader and with Steve in the race, we've got a real chance at doing it.
Steve can win in Montana (he won in 2016 despite Trump carrying the state by over 20 points), but he's starting out at a huge fundraising disadvantage.
I told him how strong this team is and that we'd help him raise $10,000 today to jumpstart his campaign. **When I told him we 'd raise $10,000, I was really counting on $3 or more from you. [Please, will you help out?](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc494/2a380d31/2255c4da/f08d40/910854560/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0YnVsbG9jayIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAwMzA5X01XSDRCdWxsb2NrMl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bullock?refcode=e20200309_MWH4Bullock2_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**
Thank you -- I'm so grateful for your support.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc494/2a380d31/2255c4da/f08d40/910854560/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0YnVsbG9jayIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAwMzA5X01XSDRCdWxsb2NrMl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bullock?refcode=e20200309_MWH4Bullock2_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc494/2a380d31/2255c4da/f08d41/910854560/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Team Sara
subject: What's next?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Your hard work helped us win the primary, and we know you're going to help us send Sara to Congress. Will you chip in today so we can keep the momentum going?

| [](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b7903/27c6da69/2b3ddf41/12f1539/488026155/VEsH/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-header-textlink&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
| Friend,

As you probably know, Sara won the primary last week! We'll now go head to head with the second-place challenger in November.

Your hard work helped us win the primary, and we know you're going to help us send Sara to Congress. [_**Will you chip in today so we can keep the momentum going?**_](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b7903/27c6da69/2b3ddf41/12f153a/488026155/VEsE/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200309-1-EM&recurring=TRUE&amount=1")
---
| [DONATE $1 ](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b7903/27c6da69/2b3ddf41/12f153a/488026155/VEsF/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200309-1-EM&recurring=TRUE&amount=1")

---
Sara's primary victory shows that San Diegans are tired of political games. It's time for a new generation of leaders who will take action on climate change, gun violence, and the housing crisis. Sara will be our voice in Congress and she will always work to make our community proud.

The first major deadline of the general election is coming up at the end of the month, and our opponent and their allies will be able to see just how strong our movement is. Let's show them we're off to a strong start. [_**Pitch in today. ->**_](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b7903/27c6da69/2b3ddf41/12f153a/488026155/VEsA/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200309-1-EM&recurring=TRUE&amount=1")

Thank you!

Team Sara

Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress

Sara Jacobs is running for Congress in California's 53rd Congressional District. In Congress, she will fight for policies to address climate change, guarantee health care as a human right, end the epidemic of gun violence plaguing our schools and communities, and defend access to reproductive care. Sara is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! _[You can make a contribution to her campaign here.](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b7903/27c6da69/2b3ddf41/12f153f/488026155/VEsHBw/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-footer-textlink&recurring=true&amount=25")_

Your hard work helped us win the primary, and we know you're going to help us send Sara to Congress. "" | "" | "" | "" Sara's primary victory shows that San Diegans are tired of political games. It's time for a new generation of leaders who will take action on climate change, gun violence, and the housing crisis. Sara will be our voice in Congress and she will always work to make our community proud. The first major deadline of the general election is coming up at the end of the month, and our opponent and their allies will be able to see just how strong our movement is. Let's show them we're off to a strong start. "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Thank you! Team Sara * | | "" Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs is running for Congress in California's 53rd Congressional District. In Congress, she will fight for policies to address climate change, guarantee health care as a human right, end the epidemic of gun violence plaguing our schools and communities, and defend access to reproductive care. Sara is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! "" "" | "" Emails are crucial for communicating with top supporters. name: Tina Ramirez for U.S. Congress
subject: Tina Ramirez Announces First Round of Local Endorsements
body:
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
[](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhidkkld-udthdyhkil-i/)
| | | _**Republican Tina Ramirez Announces First Round of Local Endorsements**_ **Midlothian, Virginia** – Today, Tina Ramirez announces her first round of local endorsements from inside Virginia’s 7th Congressional District. These local elected officials, community leaders, and conservative activists represent the grassroots momentum that Tina Ramirez has experienced since announcing her run for Congress. Endorsements: _Neil Spoonhower - Goochland County Board of Supervisors
Chris Winslow - Chesterfield County Board of Supervisors
Debbie Bailey - Chairman, Chesterfield County School Board
Kirk Twigg - Spotsylvania School Board
Carey Allen - Chesterfield Soil and Water District Director and Vice-Chair of the Chesterfield County Republican Committee
Chuck Fadus - Midlothian Magisterial District Chairman
Patrick Regan - Former Treasurer, Chesterfield County Republican Committee
Phil Scott - Candidate for Spotsylvania School Board
Jerry Baldwin - Former Past Chairman, Chesterfield County Republican Committee
Tammy Ridout - Former Candidate for Chesterfield County Board of Supervisors
Thomas Glessner - Spotsylvania County - President of National Institute of Family and Life Advocates
Dr. Ben Howerton - Henrico County - Chair of First Freedom Council_ “I’m humbled and honored to have large local support from leaders across the district. Since the beginning of this race, I have made it a priority to run a campaign fueled by local resources and conservative activists inside the 7th Congressional District, not DC politicians and lobbyists,” said Tina Ramirez. “These endorsements show grassroots momentum that will ultimately lead to victory against Abigail Spanberger in the fall.” ### _Tina Ramirez grew up in rural Powhatan County, Virginia. Tina has 20 years of experience as a public school teacher, foreign policy expert, and authority on international human rights law and religious freedom. Before starting Hardwired Global, Tina worked for the U.S. Commission on International Religious Freedom, where she developed policy recommendations to protect persecuted communities in Sudan, Iraq, Turkey, Georgia, and Cuba. While working for the U.S. Congress, she founded the bi-partisan International Religious Freedom Caucus. Her intent and major accomplishment was re-directing U.S. policy so that religious freedom was prioritized when dealing with foreign governments. Tina has traveled to over 30 countries in the course of her work and has written and spoken extensively, including before the United Nations and the African Union, and testified before the U.S. Congress. Tina and her 4-year-old daughter, Abigail, live in the Richmond suburbs._ **For Press Inquiries** –
**Contact** : _[Cindy@TinaRamirez.com](mailto:Cindy@TinaRamirez.com)_
**Phone** : 804-384-3674
---
---
**[Website](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhidkkld-udthdyhkil-d/) | [Facebook](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhidkkld-udthdyhkil-h/) | [Twitter](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhidkkld-udthdyhkil-k/) | [Instagram](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhidkkld-udthdyhkil-u/) | **[**Donate**](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhidkkld-udthdyhkil-o/)

name: Dean Browning
subject: Buy and Lie Lisa Scheller
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
While the bid for the Democratic Presidential nominee is now between a self-proclaimed Communist and an addled long-time Democratic swamp creature, my campaign is still focused on one thing: defeating Representative Susan Wild in November. But before I can take on Susan Wild, I must secure the Republican nomination on April 28th. Let me tell you, I am up against the Establishment and their preferred candidate who is Pro-Sanctuary City, Pro-Abortion and who says one thing while doing another. I want you to know, , that Lisa Scheller is our local version of Michael Bloomberg.
Just like Michael Bloomberg, Lisa Scheller wants to "Buy and Lie" her way into office by using her money to flood your mailbox and cable news to try and re-write her past. For example:
* Lisa says she wants to work with President Trump, yet she was a Never Trumper and gave the maximum donation to John Kasich when he ran against the President. Lisa did not mention President Trump once during her campaign kickoff and when asked, she said she did not want to "make this a litmus test on Trump".
* Lisa says she wants to eliminate Sanctuary Cities, yet as Commissioner she voted for the resolution that made Lehigh County a Sanctuary County.
* Lisa says she is pro-life, yet she has said abortion should be legal and she refuses to make public her answers to the National Right to Life's Congressional Candidate Questionnaire.
* Lisa says she is for term limits, yet as Commissioner she sponsored and approved the ordinance that prevented Lehigh County voters from being able to decide on a ballot initiative that would have set term limits on Lehigh County politicians.
* Lisa says she opposes corporate handouts, yet the huge corporation she owns took our tax dollars - stimulus money from President Obama - to line her own pockets.

Actions speak louder than words and I need your financial support to take down "Buy and Lie" Lisa Scheller who is being backed by Washington special interests who don't care about you and me. Will you help me prove that the only way to run a campaign is with the support of hard-working Americans, like yourself, by donating $100, $50, or even just $25 today?
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017vlFNTlNYdH0OfQ1fQjBE-ISq6Lz0MLDo8IMTO47ijpYAcBP3dghzU6roPDMeVfFfSMXM1677Cm7SPDMmP-kGn0CeMTnCEcKhUo0pEH7zwNDWvI6mwq7WaY7hUOyuHSP7UXsPDihvIRBNYZGVNs74pFYUpMkDN3UI1pHY_3c2E8PRC2_5xq0sw==&c=FsI5M9tKl89UPvJ-SVWco8xnK2rsmJuHAkO5jvxQ1MIBIrkRz4MJOA==&ch=MPGgw9f_1u5EONfaD286C1Vd6wl6JlBja9WKg8jCe4sAPj8v-qpzrw==)
---
| I firmly believe Lisa Scheller's current views are a matter of convenience to try and get her through the primary. Her past actions prove that she is 180 degrees from my views on ending illegal immigration, on eliminating sanctuary cities, on protecting the life of the unborn from the moment of conception and on draining the Swamp. But , my biggest fear is that if she's elected, she will be just another "RINO" and fail to back President Trump as he fights to Keep America Great. From looking at her previous voting record... this is a real threat-- she is a wolf in sheep's clothes. We cannot let this happen!! The people of Lehigh Valley deserve someone in Congress who is unwavering in their conservative values and has not sold out to Washington special interests.
Most importantly, the Lehigh Valley deserves a candidate who will be an ally of President Donald J. Trump and who will support his agenda unequivocally! I urge you to donate to my campaign today so that I can defeat my "Republican" primary opponent in April. A donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 will help me support our President and bring conservative values back to our district.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017vlFNTlNYdH0OfQ1fQjBE-ISq6Lz0MLDo8IMTO47ijpYAcBP3dghzU6roPDMeVfFfSMXM1677Cm7SPDMmP-kGn0CeMTnCEcKhUo0pEH7zwNDWvI6mwq7WaY7hUOyuHSP7UXsPDihvIRBNYZGVNs74pFYUpMkDN3UI1pHY_3c2E8PRC2_5xq0sw==&c=FsI5M9tKl89UPvJ-SVWco8xnK2rsmJuHAkO5jvxQ1MIBIrkRz4MJOA==&ch=MPGgw9f_1u5EONfaD286C1Vd6wl6JlBja9WKg8jCe4sAPj8v-qpzrw==)
---
| For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. ~ Have you heard about "Buy and Lie" Lisa Scheller's bid for the Republican nomination for Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District? We already know she's a vote against Donald Trump, but is she a vote against the American people too...? A donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 will ensure a true Conservative will wins the Republican nomination in April.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017vlFNTlNYdH0OfQ1fQjBE-ISq6Lz0MLDo8IMTO47ijpYAcBP3dghzU6roPDMeVfFfSMXM1677Cm7SPDMmP-kGn0CeMTnCEcKhUo0pEH7zwNDWvI6mwq7WaY7hUOyuHSP7UXsPDihvIRBNYZGVNs74pFYUpMkDN3UI1pHY_3c2E8PRC2_5xq0sw==&c=FsI5M9tKl89UPvJ-SVWco8xnK2rsmJuHAkO5jvxQ1MIBIrkRz4MJOA==&ch=MPGgw9f_1u5EONfaD286C1Vd6wl6JlBja9WKg8jCe4sAPj8v-qpzrw==)

name: Mary Mancini
subject: We sued and we won
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
This past week was a lot – from the tragic tornadoes that ravaged middle Tennessee to Super Tuesday to the first confirmed case of the coronavirus in the state.
When it mattered most though, and because of your support, the Tennessee Democratic Party had the resources we needed to respond effectively: we filed a winning lawsuit on Super Tuesday to extend polling hours and ensure that those affected by the tornado could vote. And we helped increase Democratic primary voter turnout by 40% from 2016.
To make sure we can continue our work of supporting and turning out voters, for the month of March we are firing up our GRASSROOTS LEADERS PROGRAM.
A GRASSROOTS LEADER invests in the TNDP by setting up a recurring monthly donation of $5, $10, $20 or more from now until November 2020.
We’ve set a goal of 800 new GRASSROOTS LEADERS for this election cycle, and we need your help.
Will you commit to a recurring donation today, and give us the resources needed to help Tennessee Democrats? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ku1Wl75_AESO4JtpprIMGw2]
To put it simply – we were prepared because of the support of Tennessee Democrats like you. That’s why our GRASSROOTS LEADERS program is so important - so we know we’ll have what we need when we need it. Please consider committing to a monthly donation today, and help us reach our goal of 800 new GRASSROOTS LEADERS – it would mean the world to us.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/ku1Wl75_AESO4JtpprIMGw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ku1Wl75_AESO4JtpprIMGw2]
Thank you,
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

As the _York Dispatch_ pointed out last week, South Central PA is rapidly changing, and that means **what was once a Republican stronghold is now one of the most competitive Congressional districts in the entire country.**

[**Eugene is exactly the type of experienced leader that South Central PA needs to flip this seat blue -- and help deliver the state of Pennsylvania to the Democratic nominee in November. But within our state, South Central PA will be a battleground within a battleground. As the York Dispatch pointed out last week, South Central PA is rapidly changing, and that means what was once a Republican stronghold is now one of the most competitive Congressional districts in the entire country. = = We already know that the Koch-backed Americans For Prosperity is bankrolling Scott Perry’s campaign, and other special interest groups will be lining up to make sure this seat stays in Republican hands. But just like he’s done as Auditor General, Eugene will continue fighting for hard-working Pennsylvanians in Congress. = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Team Eugene Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: | = Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. name: Team Rita
subject: Rita Review: March 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4ZNH6tkIPcyD5luP4RumityU52__guqvyxkpB7qqQrw=/dNUO4Tx1Wrq4j1JAEoywtTAASS3Bq6AKfjriIea0JxI=?refcode=200310-email) _Welcome to the March edition of the Rita Review! February was such a busy month, and we 're happy to share all the campaign happenings with you. >From singing to listening to students, Rita's been busy engaging with members of our community from all walks of life: _ **Safety note for the Coronavirus** Before we get into this month's Rita Review, we want to make sure you're all staying safe and taking the necessary precautions to protect yourself and your loved ones from the Coronavirus. Make sure you limit travel if you can and wash your hands thoroughly with disinfecting soap. While more than 80% of those who contract the Coronavirus experience mild symptoms, the elderly and those with diabetes, heart disease, lung disease and immunodeficiencies are at a high risk of more serious, and even deadly, symptoms. Even if you're not at high risk, make sure you're following the below guidelines in order to keep our most vulnerable communities safe: [Center for Disease Control's Resources for Households](https://act.myngp.com/el/4ZNH6tkIPcyD5luP4RumityU52__guqvyxkpB7qqQrw=/Ihp9GiNPDsdU1EeSIYGZY_JTCZQZMht6bpfmaJ-R0X4=) [Iowa Department of Public Health's Resources](https://act.myngp.com/el/4ZNH6tkIPcyD5luP4RumityU52__guqvyxkpB7qqQrw=/lv6jIKS3QxsVQeGOuvKoTxEHiBE4TyRRPY3ALp7eOhg=) **Getting Rita on the Ballot** Rita is now officially on the ballot! She filled out the paperwork last week and is now officially a candidate for Iowa's Second Congressional District. We're excited to celebrate this campaign milestone with all of you. Rita is happy to run to represent every voice in the district, not just the loud and powerful interests that promote gridlock. Thanks for all your support getting us this far, and we're looking forward to what the months ahead have in store! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4ZNH6tkIPcyD5luP4RumityU52__guqvyxkpB7qqQrw=/dNUO4Tx1Wrq4j1JAEoywtTAASS3Bq6AKfjriIea0JxI=?refcode=200310-email) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4ZNH6tkIPcyD5luP4RumityU52__guqvyxkpB7qqQrw=/dNUO4Tx1Wrq4j1JAEoywtTAASS3Bq6AKfjriIea0JxI=?refcode=200310-email) **Chili Cook-off** Rita got in the mix at the Iowa City Federation of Labor and TeamCAN's Chili Cook-off! Rita had the chance to have some great conversations and some equally good chili. It's always a winning combo to enjoy delicious food and important discussions. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4ZNH6tkIPcyD5luP4RumityU52__guqvyxkpB7qqQrw=/dNUO4Tx1Wrq4j1JAEoywtTAASS3Bq6AKfjriIea0JxI=?refcode=200310-email) **Hearing Valuable Stories** Stories are one of the greatest gifts you can share. Rita met with some passionate folks in Muscatine and ate lunch at Arandas 3 in Wapello. She heard their stories about why we need to lower the cost of health care, invest in infrastructure and flood protection, improve our water quality, fix our broken campaign finance system, and keep our promises to our veterans. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4ZNH6tkIPcyD5luP4RumityU52__guqvyxkpB7qqQrw=/dNUO4Tx1Wrq4j1JAEoywtTAASS3Bq6AKfjriIea0JxI=?refcode=200310-email) **Bringing up Mental Health** Access to mental health treatment, especially in rural areas, means a lot to Rita. She visited Smokey Row in Oskaloosa for some great conversation on the topic. Listening to rural Iowans is one of the best ways for us to come together and understand what our communities need and how we can solve these problems, together. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4ZNH6tkIPcyD5luP4RumityU52__guqvyxkpB7qqQrw=/dNUO4Tx1Wrq4j1JAEoywtTAASS3Bq6AKfjriIea0JxI=?refcode=200310-email) **Discovering History** Rita had the pleasure of exploring the Hotel Manning in Keosauqua last month. Hotel Manning was originally built in the 1840s, then rebuilt in the 1890s. This piece of history can tangibly connect us to our roots, and community members are inspiring in their dedication to its continued restoration. We were also proud to learn that the Catalyst Grant, a piece of legislation that Rita initiated and worked on, provided some of the funding they need! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4ZNH6tkIPcyD5luP4RumityU52__guqvyxkpB7qqQrw=/dNUO4Tx1Wrq4j1JAEoywtTAASS3Bq6AKfjriIea0JxI=?refcode=200310-email) **Believing in Public Education** Rita taught in rural schools for over 20 years, so it was a joy visiting with teachers in Ottumwa and discussing the challenges and opportunities they see in their students and classrooms. Rita will work to invest in schools and reduce the emphasis on standardized testing. This is far from just a talking point for Rita; these are her roots! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4ZNH6tkIPcyD5luP4RumityU52__guqvyxkpB7qqQrw=/dNUO4Tx1Wrq4j1JAEoywtTAASS3Bq6AKfjriIea0JxI=?refcode=200310-email) _That 's it for the March 2020 Rita Review. We're continuing to travel and listen to the stories of every single person in Iowa's 2nd district, and we couldn't do it without your help. The best part about campaigning is being able to engage in our community, and it's thanks to supporters like you that we can keep doing so. _ | __**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/4ZNH6tkIPcyD5luP4RumityU52__guqvyxkpB7qqQrw=/dNUO4Tx1Wrq4j1JAEoywtTAASS3Bq6AKfjriIea0JxI=?refcode=200310-email)**__
---
__ __
__ __
__ __
__Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
---
__
__Rita Hart for Iowa
P.O. Box 333
Wheatland IA 52777 United States__
__If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please[unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/4ZNH6tkIPcyD5luP4RumityU52__guqvyxkpB7qqQrw=/3DKjrQiIUodAHzKfZosWzxARZBPRnU-_EX5o93ZQI6A=).__

__** **__

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump’s Style of Leadership is a Plus in This Kind of Crisis
body:
"I have participated in tabletop exercises involving pandemic response; indecision is both seductive and dangerous, as Japan and South Korea are..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2f92e03396&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump’s Style of Leadership is a Plus in This Kind of Crisis**

“I have participated in tabletop exercises involving pandemic response; indecision is both seductive and dangerous, as Japan and South Korea are finding out,” former Sen. Jim Talent writes for Fox News. President Trump, on the other hand, responded quickly and effectively, shutting down flights from China in January to give officials time to prepare.

“Trump’s style of leadership is on balance a plus in this kind of a crisis. He is neither afraid to make decisions nor overly concerned about being criticized for the decisions he makes. That is vital.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ca1aac06b6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump on Monday proposed emergency measures, including a temporary payroll tax cut and expanded sick leave, to prevent an economic slowdown and to blunt the spread of the coronavirus.” The President said he is helping small businesses, as well as hourly wage earners who are forced to miss work, “so they don’t get penalized for something that’s not their fault,” Dave Boyer reports in [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c43c7ad590&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump’s long-promised border wall is working.” The new chief of U.S. Border Patrol shared that parts of the new “wall system”—which replaces miles of ragtag broken fencing—are 90 percent effective, up from just 10 percent before. More than 200 additional miles of wall are currently under construction, and over 400 more miles are now in pre-construction, Paul Bedard reports for the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6150f4bf2a&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump’s ‘energy dominance’ agenda will help America get through the coronavirus fallout. Using domestic oil, gas and coal to produce our own energy and electricity, we can rebuild every sector of the economy by bringing products and jobs back from overseas,” American energy expert Daniel Turner writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=61418748f9&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=906e6d0df5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d3e65ee52c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=46c666c642)
---

---

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Send me to fight the Squad!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h5GXBgtaNZNxmng&b=aReJARdt4K4km.39Vy1.wg)
---
Dear Peter,
I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.

**I am disgusted and shocked by the extremism and anti-Americanism of the Socialist "Squad", the group of radical Democrats led by AOC. **

These four individuals all believe in extreme ideas, overturning our Constitution, revocation of our rights, and the destruction of our society.

[Will you help me get](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h5GXBgtaNZNxmng&b=aReJARdt4K4km.39Vy1.wg) to Congress to act as a check and balance on these radicals?

Squad member Ilhan Omar - who committed immigration fraud by marrying her brother - was spouting her hatred on Twitter lately:

_Rep. Ilhan Omar, D-MN, took to Twitter Wednesday with some very accusatory Tweets. She suggested two SCOTUS Judges of being “accused sexual predators” and then stated that abortion was a Constitutional right._

_“Two accused sexual predators should not be deciding whether or not women have access to healthcare in this country,” she said. She is allegedly referring to unproven and false claims against Justices Brett Kavanaugh and Clarence Thomas. Her statements were met with backlash from people around the country._

**The Democrats are hate-filled and anti-American. It's time to take the keys of power away from them!**

_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi!_ She and her insane leftist agenda can go to Hell!

I am pro-America. Democrats like AOC and Butterfield are anti-America. We will defeat them together- but [only with your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h5GXBgtaNZNxmng&b=aReJARdt4K4km.39Vy1.wg)!

[Can you help me?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h5GXBgtaNZNxmng&b=aReJARdt4K4km.39Vy1.wg)

I have a big fundraising deadline at the end of this month, I must raise $50,000 to keep pace with my radical Dem opponent.

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h5GXBgtaNZNxmng&b=aReJARdt4K4km.39Vy1.wg), with your maximum contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000, or even $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

Team, While the other side is focusing on amplifying President Trump's message of xenophobia, hostility, and racism towards immigrant communities, our team is working to amplify the voices of the people that make our district, our neighborhoods, and our homes the incredible places they are and should be. Why is it acceptable to flaunt an anti-immigration message and call it a policy stance as opposed to what it really is: racist and xenophobic. Why is the other side unabashedly campaigning on continuing Trump's stance on separating children from their families? The time to speak up is now. [**Add your name to mine and call on my GOP opposition to end their anti-immigrant rhetoric. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/i0VoshEqCETfZVkJQs2bbqA6vvi8s3yTUZpCPpN8J2Q=/7yvzD7utPucBf-3Qs9PfiZ0pKl4Fey2tvqjuOUCn2ik=) | ****** ** | ******[SIGN ON ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/i0VoshEqCETfZVkJQs2bbqA6vvi8s3yTUZpCPpN8J2Q=/7yvzD7utPucBf-3Qs9PfiZ0pKl4Fey2tvqjuOUCn2ik=)******
---
********

One of my opponents fashions herself as "The Wall who will help Donald Trump build a wall!" But I know that Texans put one thing before everything else: our family. No matter our faith, our gender, the language we speak, who we love, or where we were born, we are united as Texans in our shared belief that our families come first.
And that means standing up for the many families that have been attacked relentlessly and can't face the hatred and bigotry alone.
It's time to stand up for immigrants' rights. Stand with me and add your name if you agree: **[Sri2020.com/immigration](https://act.myngp.com/el/i0VoshEqCETfZVkJQs2bbqA6vvi8s3yTUZpCPpN8J2Q=/fPGE2vV4dk42Ou3t8Vay4xISAdZC07Iy244IUPRTH00=)**.
Thank you,

Sri Preston Kulkarni

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Mace=20for=20Congress?=
subject: BREAKING: a HUGE endorsement 📨
body:
BREAKING: a HUGE endorsement 📨 | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace.org/breaking-a-huge-endorsement?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=6ed61ef455&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=4d457227fa&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | Friend,

Today we announced a **_HUGE endorsement_** for our campaign to take back the Lowcountry -- **House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy. **

I could not be more humbled to have Leader McCarthy's support for my campaign to win back the First District!

“Nancy Mace is a uniquely impressive candidate and I proudly endorse her for Congress," said McCarthy.

"Her deep local roots and impressive life story makes her the ideal leader to represent the great people of South Carolina’s First District. Nancy’s tireless work ethic, conservative track record, and ability to get things done are exactly what’s needed on Capitol Hill. I look forward to fighting alongside her in Congress to Keep America Great."
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=de41b1415e&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| In order to take back the majority, must come together to defeat Joe Cunningham.

I'm proud to be running a campaign welcoming of all -- to _represent all of the Lowcountry._ People from all across the party, including fiscally conservative champions like the **Club for Growth, Sen. Rand Paul, Rep. Elise Stefanik, AND Republican leadership**, are all uniting behind my candidacy. They know no one will work harder than I will and not only do I have the experience, but I have a record more representative of the Lowcountry than anyone else in this race and I am in the best position to win.

It's **time to unite** to beat Joe, not just for my family, but yours, too, and for every single person in the Lowcountry.

It's with the most sincere appreciation, that I say thank you!

Sincerely,

[](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=d0f497526c&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
|
---

name: Team Scholten
subject: Rural communities can’t be left behind in our coronavirus response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter,

We are in the middle of a public health crisis, and leaders in Washington remain woefully unprepared to create a plan to address it.

Coronavirus is a threat that demands competent leadership, but all we’ve seen is chaos, denials, outright lies, misinformation, and more corporate handouts. The Administration is putting the profits of Wall Street and corporations over helping sick people, and we’re running the risk of doing too little, too late.

The response to coronavirus can’t leave rural America behind. Rural communities are at a higher risk of worse outcomes — and any federal response should adequately confront these challenges.

**[Add your name to our petition if you agree: We can’t forget about rural communities during this public health crisis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15940617/168757932/449679283?ms=em20_200310_covid&refcode=em20_200310_covid&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDg4NWYyMC0xMjYzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UDLc4G7t1qtjdAgdovlXwbQgOgvWYyISVYRKpeNwSVQ=&emci=7e5d539c-f862-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=44885f20-1263-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6658013)**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15940618/168757933/449679283?ms=em20_200310_covid&refcode=em20_200310_covid&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDg4NWYyMC0xMjYzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UDLc4G7t1qtjdAgdovlXwbQgOgvWYyISVYRKpeNwSVQ=&emci=7e5d539c-f862-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=44885f20-1263-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6658013)
---

Some leaders — but not enough — have condemned the chaos, while demanding the response prioritize the health and safety of Americans over corporate interests.

With the proper response, we can contain coronavirus, prevent the spread, and aid those already infected — but only if our leaders understand who needs the most help.

**[Add your name in calling for a response to coronavirus that addresses the unique challenges facing rural communities.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15940619/168757934/449679283?ms=em20_200310_covid&refcode=em20_200310_covid&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDg4NWYyMC0xMjYzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UDLc4G7t1qtjdAgdovlXwbQgOgvWYyISVYRKpeNwSVQ=&emci=7e5d539c-f862-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=44885f20-1263-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6658013)**

[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15940620/168757935/449679283?ms=em20_200310_covid&refcode=em20_200310_covid&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDg4NWYyMC0xMjYzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UDLc4G7t1qtjdAgdovlXwbQgOgvWYyISVYRKpeNwSVQ=&emci=7e5d539c-f862-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=44885f20-1263-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6658013)

Thanks,

clean_body: Peter, We are in the middle of a public health crisis, and leaders in Washington remain woefully unprepared to create a plan to address it. Coronavirus is a threat that demands competent leadership, but all we’ve seen is chaos, denials, outright lies, misinformation, and more corporate handouts. The Administration is putting the profits of Wall Street and corporations over helping sick people, and we’re running the risk of doing too little, too late. The response to coronavirus can’t leave rural America behind. Rural communities are at a higher risk of worse outcomes — and any federal response should adequately confront these challenges. | Some leaders — but not enough — have condemned the chaos, while demanding the response prioritize the health and safety of Americans over corporate interests. With the proper response, we can contain coronavirus, prevent the spread, and aid those already infected — but only if our leaders understand who needs the most help. Thanks, Team Scholten

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Zephyr Teachout and I want to support grassroots candidates
body:
Peter,

Zephyr Teachout and I want every single registered voter in the country to have a voucher that they can put towards electing grassroots candidates running for office.

We co-wrote an op-ed in the Gotham Gazette calling for Democracy Vouchers at the federal level: Voters would receive vouchers that they could donate to candidates of their choosing, so long as those candidates agree to certain campaign finance restrictions. The program is already working in cities like Seattle, and we believe it can work on the federal level too.

Zephyr and I know how difficult it can be to take on the establishment and limit the outsized influence of special interests in our elections. We have the power to reject special interest groups altogether, but it’s going to take bold, progressive ideas like Democracy Vouchers to get us there.

I’m committed to getting dark money out of our politics so that other energetic, diverse, upstart candidates can run for office too. But we don't have to wait for Democracy Vouchers to prove that people power can win. Will you chip in today to show people can defeat corporations? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab031020

Best,
Adem

P.S. See below to read the full text of my op-ed with Zephyr Teachout!

DONATE TODAY https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab031020

To Have Truly People-Powered Campaigns, We Need Democracy Vouchers

We’re just a few months into 2020, and it has been the focus for much of the country for months, if not years, and for good reason -- it is the most important election our democracy has faced in decades. While voter turnout is projected to be record-breaking this year, one of the greatest inequalities of our democracy still needs serious legislative reform: campaign finance.

In 2016, 15% of Americans reported making a political donation, but only 0.52% of the population controlled 67.8% of the total political donations by donating at least $200. Two years later, in 2018, the numbers were worse: 0.47% of the population contributed at least $200 to a campaign, but totaled 71% of all political donations.

Up and down the ballot, more and more candidates are making voluntary pledges to reject corporate PAC money and donations from special interest groups. Several Democratic presidential primary candidates are breaking records with their number of small-dollar donors. But these are voluntary pledges and candidates down the ballot will never be able to match the energy surrounding a presidential campaign.

Although we come from different backgrounds, we have both worked to serve our communities and have run for office against machine-backed candidates. As we can both attest, raising enough money to take on the establishment is hard and we have seen firsthand the impact of corporate money in campaigns -- and the power in the movement to remove special interest money from politics altogether.

It will take legislative change to elevate the value of small-dollar donors and fully get special interest money out of politics.

The most exciting idea, a proposal with potentially transformative effects, is Democracy Vouchers at the federal level. Democracy Vouchers are a simple concept - jurisdictions grant voters vouchers of a select dollar amount that they can donate to the candidates of their choice, as long as the candidates vow to meet certain contribution limits.

For example, every voter in America could get $50 under legislation proposed by Rep. Ro Khanna. They could only use that $50 on federal elections. People know that money matters in campaigns, and because of that, they feel (more) shut out.

Democracy Vouchers have proven to be effective — Seattle voted to implement Democracy Vouchers in 2015 and then piloted its program in 2017. The initial impact of the voucher program included doubling the percentage of giving coming from people under the age of 25 and an increase in people of color making donations. The time for Democracy Vouchers to be more widely implemented has come.

Their ability to empower people to become further engaged in the political process is tremendously important, especially in low-income areas. For too long, candidates, especially challengers, running in low-income areas have had to fundraise outside their communities to run viable campaigns — necessarily giving outsiders the power to decide what matters most and protecting incumbents. Democracy Vouchers would serve as an equalizer for all donors and create greater opportunity for low-income communities to donate to the candidates they believe in.

If we are going to continue the progress we made in 2018 to create the most diverse Congress in history, we must find ways to level the playing field so that more candidates, including women and people of color, are empowered to run. If we are truly going to rid special interests from politics, we must institute public campaign financing through Democracy Vouchers at the federal level and hold leaders accountable for letting corporations -- not people -- dictate their leadership.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright © 2020 Friends of Adem, All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you have subscribed to emails from Adem for Congress, made a donation to or volunteered for the campaign, or are a friend of Adem Bunkeddeko. |
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Friends of Adem
P.O. Box 130-427
Brooklyn NY 11213-0427 United States

---
| | **Friend-**

---
| | Serving in elected office was never meant to be a career. The Constitution was based on the idea of citizen legislators who believed in public service and were accountable to the communities they represented.

[Here is a video I recorded while signing the Term Limits Pledge:](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=118A158A1A1944)

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=118A158A1A1944)
---
| | |
---
| | Combined, Nancy Pelosi, Jerry Nadler and Adam Schiff have served 84 years in Congress.

This is why I strongly support term limits. I believe they are the best mechanism to end the era of career politicians and fight corruption in the Washington Swamp.
[I’ve signed a pledge to support term limits for members of Congress. Help me get to Washington so I can fulfill my pledge and sponsor legislation.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=118A158A1A1945)

Sincerely,
Nicole

name: =?utf-8?Q?Hirsh=20Singh?=
subject: Two major GOP endorsements overnight!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
We've come so far, Friend! This wouldn't be possible without your support! | | | Dear Friend,

When President Trump took office, he promised us that we'd KEEP ON WINNING. We'd WIN SO MUCH, he told us, we might even get tired of WINNING!

**Well Friend, I'm not one bit tired. Last night, I was blessed with not one, but _two_ endorsements from the Ocean County GOP!**

Just like the last time I reached out to you, I've included my team's announcement below so you can see the progress we're making. I hope you're not tired of winning either, because we've still got lots more WINNING to do!

Cheers,
Hirsh

\---------- Forwarded message ----------

---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=ae23ae3c51&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| March 10th, 2020
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Contact: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)
---
| |
# Ocean County GOP Chairman Frank Holman and Vice-Chairwoman Barbara Lanuto Endorse Hirsh Singh for U.S. Senate

Linwood, NJ – Hirsh Singh, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate in New Jersey, today received the endorsement of Ocean County Republican Organization Chairman Frank Holman and Vice-Chairwoman Barbara Lanuto.

“Singh is a fighter, and he earned the Ocean County GOP endorsement resoundingly. He spoke with and met with almost every member in the county and they know he is our only chance to beat Cory Booker and win the US Senate seat in New Jersey. Hirsh started his campaign early and worked to ensure Republican victories up and down the ticket since 2019. His youth, energy and ability to inspire are unparalleled.

"We trust him and will support him to be the Republican nominee fully,” said Holman. “Singh is a leader, and the future of the Republican Party that understands grassroots campaigning with strong conservative principles.”

“With Ocean County at his back, Singh will lead New Jersey to a Republican decade,” said Lanuto. “Singh has the full support of our organization and I encourage every member of our team to join me in endorsing Singh’s campaign,” said Holman.

“My family’s story in America started in Ocean County, there could be no better county to start the Republican resurgence of New Jersey than in Ocean County which is the biggest Republican stronghold of New Jersey. I am humbled to earn the endorsement of Chairman Holman,” said Singh.

Singh has already been endorsed by RNC Committeeman Bill Palatucci, State Committeewoman Janice Fields, Atlantic County’s Linwood Republican Club, the Conservative Party of New Jersey, and Bergen County’s and New Jersey’s youngest County Committeeman Michael Schnoll. ###
---
| For any inquiries, please reply to this message or send an email to: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)

Additional information is available on our [official website](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=7d56c56f0a&e=3e017fab0f) and [Facebook](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=f1f3ec20a3&e=3e017fab0f) page.

Thank you,
**The Singh for Senate Press Team**
_For the People_

|

Peter,

Remember last month when Bernie Sanders said this...

_“We're very opposed to the authoritarian nature of Cuba but you know, it's unfair to simply say everything is bad. When Fidel Castro came into office, you know what he did? He had a massive literacy program. Is that a bad thing?”_

**Well, Donna Shalala, is that a bad thing?**

It’s bad enough that the Democrats have a _**PROUD**_ socialist as one of their leading candidates, who also openly _**DEFENDED**_ Fidel Castro’s regime, but it’s even worse when South Florida’s current representative won’t even vote to condemn these misguided attempts to whitewash Latin American history!

Shalala’s attempts to straddle the party line are _**INSULTING**_ to the thousands of Floridians who were forced to leave their homes in order to escape the destruction of socialism.

name: James Mackler
subject: This is a crisis →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
13 closed rural hospitals
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1a0/18d6a294/4ccf75f6/26d61865/1169313068/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | **_The Jackson Sun_ : "Decatur County leaders vote to close rural Tennessee hospital"** Another rural hospital in Tennessee is set to close its doors. Honestly, this is a crisis. **This will be the 4th rural hospital to close in Tennessee since I launched this campaign in front of another closed hospital in McKenzie. At least 13 have closed in our state since 2012 and now Tennessee leads the nation in closed rural hospitals per person.** As health care costs rise, health insurance payments lag behind, and over time, rural hospitals can't afford to operate. Tennessee families in those rural communities are left to make tough decisions like figuring out how to take time off work or school to drive the long distances to the nearest provider or they are forced to make dangerous decisions like putting off or foregoing care altogether. [_**No one should be forced to choose between their health or putting food on the table. Add your name and demand our leaders take action to protect and expand access to health care ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1a0/18d6a294/4ccf75f6/26d61862/1169313068/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200310p") Not only are Republican leaders failing to address this crisis, they're actively trying to take away health care from millions of Americans by supporting a Supreme Court case that could _**overturn the Affordable Care Act in its entirety.**_ Enough is enough. [_**We need our leaders to work to improve health care -- not take it away. If you agree, add your name today ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1a0/18d6a294/4ccf75f6/26d61862/1169313068/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200310p") In service, James

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Thank you for all the birthday wishes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
On Sunday, I was blessed to be joined by my friends, family, and supporters to celebrate my fiftieth birthday while I was home in Phoenix at one of my favorite local spots, The Yard.

After seven elections and twenty years in public life, I'm more thankful than ever for the support from my family and the honor of serving our great community.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7vNfDI_Ry6vBtsDN8Fg4NDUf3VPngqd1ZxQVz6H6eQ=/mv-4PEfE9cqbcfSctLoNpefid0I0y-rJnlnoqW_nH8I=)

**I was so happy to be surprised by my wife, Nicole, and my fantastic campaign team with a[card](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7vNfDI_Ry6vBtsDN8Fg4NDUf3VPngqd1ZxQVz6H6eQ=/mv-4PEfE9cqbcfSctLoNpefid0I0y-rJnlnoqW_nH8I=) signed by so many of my supporters from all across AZ-09 and the entire country who wanted to wish me a happy birthday! **

I am taking the time to read through all of the responses I received because your kind words mean so much to me and they remind me just how grateful and lucky I am to be in public service.

**If you have not yet signed the card and would like to do so, you can[sign the card here >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7vNfDI_Ry6vBtsDN8Fg4NDUf3VPngqd1ZxQVz6H6eQ=/mv-4PEfE9cqbcfSctLoNpefid0I0y-rJnlnoqW_nH8I=)**

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7vNfDI_Ry6vBtsDN8Fg4NDUf3VPngqd1ZxQVz6H6eQ=/mv-4PEfE9cqbcfSctLoNpefid0I0y-rJnlnoqW_nH8I=)

Thank you for helping make my 50th one of my most memorable birthdays of my life,

\-- _ Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---

4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

After seven elections and twenty years in public life, I'm more thankful than ever for the support from my family and the honor of serving our great community. = I was so happy to be surprised by my wife, Nicole, and my fantastic campaign team with a= signed by so many of my supporters from all across AZ-09 and the entire country who wanted to wish me a happy birthday! I am taking the time to read through all of the responses I received because your kind words mean so much to me and they remind me just how grateful and lucky I am to be in public service. If you have not yet signed the card and would like to do so, you can= = Thank you for helping make my 50th one of my most memorable birthdays of my life, \-- Greg Paid for by Stanton for Congress Stanton for Congress 4340 E Indian School Rd. Suite 21-518 Phoenix AZ 85018 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

**PREVIOUS MESSAGE:**
Folks,
Just yesterday, I wrote to you about the decades-long struggle for voting rights in America and the work we have yet to do. Then I saw this headline:
**" Texas closes hundreds of polling sites, making it harder for minorities to vote"** --_The Guardian_ (March 2, 2020)
Last year, my home state of Texas led the country in polling place closures, especially in black and latino communities. 750 polling places across the state have shut down since 2012.
**Folks, this is no accident.** Republicans are employing some of the same time-tested tactics that were used to silence black voters in the civil rights era. By making voting difficult and time-consuming, they aim to discourage folks -- especially those who are short on time off work and financial resources -- from making their voices heard.
[**It 's going to take a lot of resources to fight back against Texas Republicans' wicked and anti-democratic agenda -- can you rush a contribution now to help keep up the fight?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/OL4T57fvE9MBtXN29Jygy6cnnmRzc7BMKOvIS-CiwOY=/79LYzHeqNFMSa9jwc0lnTzDMcUX1gj3QX79hEoMAuAs=?refcode=E1715-20200310-PollsClosedKicker-SL&amount=25)

name: Team Kasich
subject: Enough talk - we need action

body:
Kasich + Schwarzenegger + Kerry - The event was the first town hall in the nation hosted by WorldWarZero, a coalition the governor signed onto earlier [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=1f07d2605152470a8d228288d6d76f28&_e=OW70Wt0D7TDzD4jFqfTlZjv6uGufBgjggRSxsfJ4p7tQMt4BqGXfVy27UH0DZTIoWKN0NLEKibQdkVgYYYimsA9GZZZ8lYUG1DpSYAJ6cMUxKv0GLpwnx56uWAPIZ5uZaCLPMUelH8H2PlpipqutYkrOaZgHMhf3U4BNKBv6sypSBsU3zOouSuHu7B80KBl2XXJkM4BLiXhd0PEpTZD3cdqjbp13TkuiVMweNpuMKGAcbNxEOzGghf7pXUOJINUOGbPUyhF1qE4cJKv83BP-rQ%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter - as part of Governor John Kasich’s continuing efforts to use his voice to help us bridge our political divide, he hosted former U.S. Sec. of State John Kerry and former California Gov. Arnold Schwarzenegger in his hometown of Westerville for a town hall to discuss the important issue of climate change.

The event was the first town hall in the nation hosted by [World War Zero](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=1f07d2605152470a8d228288d6d76f28&_e=OW70Wt0D7TDzD4jFqfTlZiriG-hioX1rRuHz6qjZ-GC5aHl7GPAT_o6RiFWFkiQtDbc-R5-8cqYOtwh-wIw9JuDOwto-XNbwJeS8hOcSSDkm5ri2G8dB5UBHWQulufJwNDY0tQiEo1t03pPpkZRcMySChndJ07NtBzxQowSZQWY-tj38DxEDdxzrYu_2fEx_ep4n851R1ZohDPPxmTT74w5De-5xO6pLJFK0jfhUn8tbNtGMKu_BsKrS8Tveju3BFfEF1c-Kaa5NiZUslQSueVmXcnRbNyE_vU7Pf9u8jsI%3D), a coalition the governor signed onto earlier this year.
|
---
[ **WorldWarZero.com** ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=1f07d2605152470a8d228288d6d76f28&_e=OW70Wt0D7TDzD4jFqfTlZiriG-hioX1rRuHz6qjZ-GC5aHl7GPAT_o6RiFWFkiQtDbc-R5-8cqYOtwh-wIw9JoJkhJ67HQjresUkMT2c_yRT3snOK-OHypfnZT_yPvILkPBuZpsOwmhCaeHJhLtTpjhIeGm0RHdeSzagyQoebJ7w35SqqOP4u_d5pmV7RS1d_9HqQalETyYnXeqDSuL7OCAl2jDy2ALLgVWC5p7fnFb3BTvQUMoSjSvDj-9UsgPlixY3_U3nttnr_XSLN80kUrol2L4jWw37MrhjuDFil0Y%3D)
[ | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=1f07d2605152470a8d228288d6d76f28&_e=OW70Wt0D7TDzD4jFqfTlZtedrv6HhDehXO1LFvosHkp49Pf0UtdV0iCLacYz9j7GpWkWewY4yfXqF5UHLgPYF3JiRBiygX10m1YVjQDmzb62sahWHngLSRmrkw-fDs7vSeULjVA1aTke4SOiRMN5ssm8_cOfS-EAGlad3hMNoIdIXka1NHSuiNJQ06FkYbyKiEN86GksgJwq7Y5STtCCbSixWIAxbOSs3VHpy6WbygQFOR-8W7u-RMs3dDeJSWlVsTUbbcdjGSoDqT3ucy4jLQ%3D%3D)
With the belief that denial of climate change is no longer enough, Gov. Kasich expressed that the time has come for people who understand the need to be good stewards of our environment to get to work finding solutions that will make more progress in our fight against climate change.
For the more than 1,000 in attendance, it was refreshing for most to see Republicans and Democrats come together during this time of deep polarization and division to have a civil conversation on a subject as sensitive as climate change.

clean_body: Kasich + Schwarzenegger + Kerry - The event was the first town hall in the nation hosted by WorldWarZero, a coalition the governor signed onto earlier | | Peter - as part of Governor John Kasich’s continuing efforts to use his voice to help us bridge our political divide, he hosted former U.S. Sec. of State John Kerry and former California Gov. Arnold Schwarzenegger in his hometown of Westerville for a town hall to discuss the important issue of climate change. The event was the first town hall in the nation hosted by , a coalition the governor signed onto earlier this year. | With the belief that denial of climate change is no longer enough, Gov. Kasich expressed that the time has come for people who understand the need to be good stewards of our environment to get to work finding solutions that will make more progress in our fight against climate change. For the more than 1,000 in attendance, it was refreshing for most to see Republicans and Democrats come together during this time of deep polarization and division to have a civil conversation on a subject as sensitive as climate change. More Video Clips: Thank you for your continued support of the governor which has allowed him to keep his voice active in shaping a more positive future for our country. -Team Kasich | View some of Gov. Kasich's recent interviews on: \-- \-- | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.www.JohnKasich.com

name: Georgette =?iso-8859-1?b?R/NtZXo=?=
subject: SIGN ON: It’s time for national paid sick leave.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15945135/168812459/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWNkMWU0Ny0yYjYzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZxDoay1rpnDvv3a0rNz_Qrr-CfqUN_tv6HqHc74_Fc=&emci=f9cd59e2-1e63-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=aacd1e47-2b63-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864)
Friends \--

The public health emergency caused by the COVID-19 virus has put the spotlight on how we treat employees in this country who are forced from work due to medical reasons.

Right now, we are correctly encouraging workers to stay home if they are feeling ill, yet there is no recourse in place to make up for lost wages.

**And this is not just about Coronavirus. Every year, millions of American workers still go to work despite being ill -- not because they want to, but because missing a paycheck could be devastating for their families.**

The United States is the only developed nation without a national policy on paid sick leave. This would be a game-changer for our economy, and it would give families the freedom to care for themselves without risking their financial security.

[**Can you add your name to my petition? Tell Congress that it’s time to pass a national paid sick leave plan to support American workers and keep our economy strong.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15945136/168812460/652509562?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWNkMWU0Ny0yYjYzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZxDoay1rpnDvv3a0rNz_Qrr-CfqUN_tv6HqHc74_Fc=&emci=f9cd59e2-1e63-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=aacd1e47-2b63-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864) **[Sign the Petition](https://secure.ngpvan.com/VP_qAaA4UEeb_OqHSo8x1Q2)****Friend, I think it’s shameful that President Trump is considering a $2 billion bailout for fossil fuel companies who have been impacted by this emergency.**

The true victims are the millions of workers struggling without sick pay — not fossil fuel executives. Our country’s failure on sick leave is hurting American families and that is the true detriment to our economy.

[**Sign the petition and urge Congress to pass legislation to provide national paid sick leave.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15945137/168812461/652509562?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWNkMWU0Ny0yYjYzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZxDoay1rpnDvv3a0rNz_Qrr-CfqUN_tv6HqHc74_Fc=&emci=f9cd59e2-1e63-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=aacd1e47-2b63-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864)

Thank you,

_Georgette Gómez_
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q1-2020?refcode=em-03102020-all-a)**

---
Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
---
Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community. _**Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.**_ Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. To support Georgette's campaign please [make a donation here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15945138/168812462/1136511447?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWNkMWU0Ny0yYjYzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZxDoay1rpnDvv3a0rNz_Qrr-CfqUN_tv6HqHc74_Fc=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f9cd59e2-1e63-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd/aacd1e47-2b63-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWNkMWU0Ny0yYjYzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZxDoay1rpnDvv3a0rNz_Qrr-CfqUN_tv6HqHc74_Fc=&id=110960909&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

subject: 10 Weeks To Go!
body:
We need your help in the home stretch! | |
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

Last week, I officially qualified to run to represent Forsyth and Gwinnett counties in Washington. I am READY to be YOUR Conservative Fighter in Congress!

---
| [ ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=60009022a6&e=c1dbff800f)
---
Qualifying Video
|
**Today marks just 10 weeks until the May 19th Republican Primary** - and with both the weather and race heating up - now is the perfect time to get involved with our grassroots campaign!

**I am asking my top supporters to please do the following:**
1. **Donate **[online](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=d345d19e49&e=c1dbff800f) – any amount helps!
2. [**Visit**](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=c6c71a1ebb&e=c1dbff800f) my website and **[volunteer](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=4b3ef001e9&e=c1dbff800f)** to make phone calls, canvass your neighborhood, host a meet & greet, or join me for an upcoming event!
3. **Like** our [Facebook](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=240f978a31&e=c1dbff800f) page, and follow me on [Twitter](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=2be5465bd3&e=c1dbff800f) and [Instagram](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=9065c11837&e=c1dbff800f).
4. **Share** campaign social media posts online with your friends and family.
5. **Display** a sign in your yard!

---
| For more information on how you can get involved, please email _Stephen@ReneeUnterman.org_!
---
|
Thank you so much for your support in this journey!

-Renee

body:

| | The deadline for candidates to file in Oregon is 5 p.m. today. At that hour, we'll find out which Republicans will be running to take me on in November. [**Will you donate $3 to our "We the People" Fund to hire organizers and build the grassroots campaign we need to win, no matter which Republican steps up?**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2ef07/6cd27893/53b0c4ad/15901b19/695747618/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-03-10-filing&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Remember: Donald Trump's pollster issued a memo a few months ago saying that they intend to compete hard to win in Oregon: [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2ef07/6cd27893/53b0c4ad/15901b19/695747618/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-03-10-filing&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") With so much on the line, **100% of your donations to the "We the People" Fund will go to building a grassroots team** to organize in every corner of Oregon, and with every community in Oregon. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump secures no-cost virus testing for Americans
body:
The Trump Administration is leading an “all-of-America” approach, as Vice President Mike Pence calls it, to protect Americans. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0173030f39&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 10, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump secures no-cost virus testing for Americans**

**The Trump Administration** is leading an “all-of-America” approach, as Vice President Mike Pence calls it, to protect Americans during the global Coronavirus outbreak.

**“Last week** , at this table, the President met with pharmaceutical leaders, we met with nursing home leaders, leaders of commercial labs, airline industries,” [Vice President Pence said](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=24da5fd6bc&e=3ee4985eea). “We’re bringing all of the businesses of the country to bear to protect the health of the American people.”

**Earlier today** , President Trump and the Vice President met with executives from America’s largest health insurance companies, where they announced a major deal.

**Vice President Pence:** [We are defending all patients against surprise billing ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d9426d2b27&e=3ee4985eea)

**“I’m pleased to report** , as you requested, Mr. President, that all the insurance companies here—either today or before today—have agreed to waive all copays on coronavirus testing and extend coverage for coronavirus treatment in all of their benefit plans,” the Vice President said.

**Medicare and Medicaid** announced recently that beneficiaries will have Coronavirus testing and treatment covered. Now, private insurers have made that commitment, as well.

**Insurers also agreed** to cover telemedicine services, which will allow all patients—particularly among the vulnerable senior population—to be treated without feeling the need to go to a hospital or doctor’s office.

**After sitting down** with insurance leaders at the White House, the President traveled to Capitol Hill this afternoon, where he and Vice President Pence met with lawmakers. “We just had a meeting on stimulus, and you’ll be hearing about it soon. But it was a great meeting,” [President Trump said](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3729703cec&e=3ee4985eea).

**He also had** one important message for Americans during this time: We’re prepared.

**“Everybody has** to be vigilant and has to be careful. But be calm,” the President said. Thanks to early preventative measures by the Administration, as well as the strong fundamentals in our economy and job market, America is in great shape to weather any storm.

[Watch today’s Coronavirus Task Force briefing live at 5:30 p.m. ET.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0ba082890d&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 **President Trump** : [Be vigilant, careful, and calm in response to Coronavirus](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0e36636cf7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

name: Bill Weld
subject: Coronavirus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
Hey Friend — Today, I want to talk about the coronavirus. With newly confirmed cases occurring throughout the nation, it’s important that we all have the most up to date information. Our state and our local governments are working together with the NIH, the CDC, and hospitals across the country to contain the virus and, if needed, to make sure that people have access to diagnostic tests and treatment. **But it’s extremely important that we continue to listen to the public health community and follow proper hygiene protocols and procedures.** We all have a responsibility to help contain the virus. That means that there are simple steps each of us should be doing, including:
* Washing your hands regularly (especially before eating, or after coughing or sneezing),
* Staying home if you are sick, and
* Disinfecting frequently touched objects with a household cleaning spray.

If you experience symptoms of the coronavirus, **contact your primary care physician and your local County Department of Health immediately**. Additionally, you can visit the dedicated Coronavirus website at the Centers for Disease Control for the latest updates at [https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Ho65PobbrrlpD_Ow9Pq_3y6Rl1ZYx2Sap7xXzPRZTDO8zxbFTk3DJ9v9IOTAkfAFSqsl_Rqm6r4ZFDZyeREvw&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200310_engs&n=1). I want to reiterate that while we all feel anxious and overwhelmed by both the virus and the news surrounding it, the threat to the general public remains low -- just as long as we all stay vigilant, and we do our part to follow safe virus prevention practices. We’ll do everything we can to keep you up to date on the latest developments. Thanks, Bill Weld
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200310_engs&n=2).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200310_engs&n=3) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200310_engs&n=4).
