Our state and our local governments are working together with the NIH, the CDC, and hospitals across the country to contain the virus and, if needed, to make sure that people have access to diagnostic tests and treatment. But it’s extremely important that we continue to listen to the public health community and follow proper hygiene protocols and procedures. We all have a responsibility to help contain the virus. That means that there are simple steps each of us should be doing, including: Washing your hands regularly (especially before eating, or after coughing or sneezing), Staying home if you are sick, and Disinfecting frequently touched objects with a household cleaning spray. If you experience symptoms of the coronavirus, contact your primary care physician and your local County Department of Health immediately**. Additionally, you can visit the dedicated Coronavirus website at the Centers for Disease Control for the latest updates at . I want to reiterate that while we all feel anxious and overwhelmed by both the virus and the news surrounding it, the threat to the general public remains low -- just as long as we all stay vigilant, and we do our part to follow safe virus prevention practices. We’ll do everything we can to keep you up to date on the latest developments. Thanks, Bill Weld Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: What we accomplished
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins
body:
My friends, it is not with a heavy heart that I am suspending my campaign to represent Montana in the U | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=d8a4dd54aeef434a98cc19a1e7c4b35f&_e=Wa5_KFvNwfieKlE-OZf97xb9DGG6Bc5ZthP6uhali49478mWR94yelnjnJq7Vbyg0bYdNjGhjYCbI_7LrGkb4__WrHB7zio5bAUmUzF6UX0QXyBT8N0BJLDWxFC_Hnkta_TNO830ROjcyzCoKsCpZzx7mHnOjd_BtB9a9TTbh4zHvQgUZLgMCqcx8MNuLvmASgLXUEZFC-rfy90iYhdpVoGyGDC04GncTqhLMydYwiXxy0dzk3lnmw7MFKS-P_ut61oo10CUWl8-Uc31_Mkpkw%3D%3D) My friends, it is not with a heavy heart that I am suspending my campaign to represent Montana in the U.S. Senate. I am overcome with joy at what we were able to accomplish and filled with hope for our great state. Since his announcement to enter the race, I’ve decided to endorse Governor Steve Bullock for Senate. He has been a Montana public servant for over a decade, and I believe he can defeat Senator Daines and finish what we started here -- a movement dedicated to flipping the Senate blue and passing legislation that benefits the people. [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=d8a4dd54aeef434a98cc19a1e7c4b35f&_e=Wa5_KFvNwfieKlE-OZf977YgNnm0LOlKFVtOyORaXPxgM9KWa2sucEF9xhluUeditNBFNzbHo5HWRHdhi8zfm36vkV4nVYhXhF1yxUGmOqJIfnujLJZz_vuhSkoTtm89D15EMpNRy4CyRQY00ksXURcYnHVj6e36YgkkeHsfQh35aASCY_Ecxu0F8sKUw6QJj-X-hWAvt2JCvd5RSABHdMhGb9tr2xrZQO_c3MoGZdFhQqkUuBu_vGOHyvRDXLL-Ilk5YkZ3d6-KgzGuFAp3OhkNnBp4VXECIlDSTogpR8IZmEVboF9J5_5I1ymiD1I2) I will never forget the support you’ve given me since I announced my candidacy last spring. Every message and every letter will stay in my heart for the rest of my days. Thank you for creating the grassroots movement that would see a Liberian refugee representing Montana in the U.S. Senate. But our movement isn’t over. It’s simply taking on a new form. Governor Bullock is a fierce advocate for our values and will make sure the Senate ensures everyone has affordable health care, that our public lands stay public and that the people, no matter who they love or the color of their skin, can live rich, fulfilling lives without fear. Steve Bullock is the best person for the job of defeating Steve Daines and what he represents. That’s why I’m dropping out and throwing all of my support behind him. Our story is not over, though the campaign may be. A former refugee from the western coast of Africa was able to run for Senate in Montana -- that proves that the American Dream is still alive. It has been the greatest honor of my life to run in this race and be able to spread our message of a new kind of democracy that works for the people rather than the powerful. And Steve Bullock is the man who can carry out that vision. Join me in throwing our support behind him. [Website](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=d8a4dd54aeef434a98cc19a1e7c4b35f&_e=Wa5_KFvNwfieKlE-OZf97xb9DGG6Bc5ZthP6uhali49IhMnr0h1Z5Bv2X79_nw-I2kraPa4vSiUwJmrbnbBzGjPTAAy_0dhhpLPdRxLO1yoV8_crWjY376M-LSRKfT2wPCaRO1XVbgoEp1UQuUrc_A1zXORBPJBCp2HRnlTLjagF0Lre2O_PADyEBPHOtrtMvUXjrsMO-FZQb8VnwHTF9dNE4-f7EOPaQdtIyJRAj6W8NdB1iJc7JItNtypd54oALhAJsrE70wNDZwGXBF6pGA%3D%3D) [Facebook](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=d8a4dd54aeef434a98cc19a1e7c4b35f&_e=Wa5_KFvNwfieKlE-OZf97_eJg9tsDujF30K628Zsz7j49u95hrwvFS_IbgXAmqZURPnAhTR0Gf4xYkYGtmVehzoVViRPy70jMJc9LXwQ8cDJ_dQCYZi889IPupXkb30KRcOFl1cYdhSbOLWMXPlBqaBa9RkaMurXofAH_uhTN8qqPIu_POYwHN5r5jGff6PtJUT38VnoQBOlwHnGItBzA-VHgK6MG8fWMo465xhwUuc5dQqIq_Py59nLTFpkQa80rY88ngWKeBbr7Xocl-kTow%3D%3D) [Twitter](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=d8a4dd54aeef434a98cc19a1e7c4b35f&_e=Wa5_KFvNwfieKlE-OZf97-_WAcoNSAEQLJTJvm1JS1S0AjwQqLiPvFBju7LXkoPHTh71J8ROtmRWsCQiHH_kyHYgBwxVz7tfwp1ryal0N8p9AAyda4-K9VCuOB1TnNuT2Y9JHydJColq1fDtUqotJHbPZDsRgpvu0u422VnVIwf4onfSn5ZEeojbCgQ4nphsTHv0u9rd0l-8ITlj7QBh4sR4srwIeyzYQbESKMWaF-3LhMQ1GPXsl0265gvi-L1SavfYrI9PRRQO-dOF5Cr1aA%3D%3D) Thank you for all you’ve done for me and for your fellow Montanans in this movement. Yours, always

Wilmot Collins

Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins

---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). Don't want to receive these emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_s=d8a4dd54aeef434a98cc19a1e7c4b35f&_t=LuydyFmwnZ_Wwnn-CCgp39oAWYbRVJXLLUoiLT5F7lHpiMzdt0S0M3EVP67RSmVF9B7wzBzpsXopcnUk59qARmtDUGf91m6tQwU8VjEJy-7shzo8Pv5QOGTguJO0bcIW8GfZ_-O6wHuHAPg9FhPo25dQsIUQ8scdA8nTZWg5oVA%3D)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Special Announcement regarding Coronavirus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
body:
Last night, after consulting with campaign staff and health
experts, I made the call to cancel our petition drive and
temporarily suspend our door knocking activities to lessen the
spread of the Coronavirus.

Laura Loomer for Congress ( http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-367464-862132-4904360-7e843b434f-e9f1a6f393 )

Patriot,

donate today and get a call from laura ( http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-367464-862132-4904361-c382472a16-e9f1a6f393 )

Last night, after consulting with campaign staff and health
experts, I made the call to cancel our petition drive and
temporarily suspend our door-knocking activities to lessen the
spread of the Coronavirus.

My congressional district, Florida 21, is home to President and
Mrs. Trump and a significant number of Senior Citizens who are
especially vulnerable to the Coronavirus.

While my campaign volunteers and I remain healthy, we interact
with hundreds of people each day and cannot risk the spread of
the virus to those who need our protection the most.

Our remaining petitioning budget is going to shift over to cover
the $10,440 filing fee to appear on the primary ballot.

Like my Democrat opponent Lois Frankel has done in the last four
elections without collecting a single signature from voters in
the community, we’ll be paying to get on the ballot, but ONLY out
of concern for the health of our Seniors and campaign volunteers.

Will you help us cover our filing fee? ( http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-367464-862132-4904361-c382472a16-e9f1a6f393 ) We have to raise $8,200 as quickly as possible to fund that
necessary expense.

Donate today and please check the box if you’d like a personal
call from me. ( http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-367464-862132-4904361-c382472a16-e9f1a6f393 ) I’d love to give you a one-on-one update on everything!

Until the risk of COVID-19 passes, we’ll be shifting all of our
volunteer efforts to phone banking and online voter contact and
as soon as we can, we’ll be sprinting back into our community to
lock in votes to win this race in November!

So please help us make this necessary adjustment and fund our
filing fee with whatever you can donate today! ( http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-367464-862132-4904361-c382472a16-e9f1a6f393 )

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. I LOVE being out in the community, and while I’ll be
suspending the petition drive and door-knocking until this virus
passes, I’ll have more time to interact with you on the phone and
online. If you donate today, please check the box if you’d like
a personal phone call from me and I’ll be happy to give you a
ring! ( http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-367464-862132-4904361-c382472a16-e9f1a6f393 )

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc

deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from
corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign
nationals are prohibited.

Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: DWS HQ
subject: Republicans are blocking democracy reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
Despite broad support, Republicans in the Senate are blocking the _For the People Act_.

**[Add your name here to demand that Mitch McConnell and the Senate Republicans move this critical bill forward to restore voting rights, publicly finance elections, challenge the power of big money in politics, and more!](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/101138b5/622b7b5b/1104a0fc/307aa0b8/3025336045/VEsH/?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://sign.actiontaker.org/HR1-Anniversary-DWS?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+here+to+demand+that+Mitch+&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_IA_200310_1_2&source=DWS_EM_JA_IA_200310_1_2&refcode=DWS_EM_JA_IA_200310_1_2")

_\----Begin Forwarded Message----_**

Last year, the House passed the _For the People Act_ to challenge the power of big money in politics, restore voting rights, and more.

These reforms are both wildly popular and absolutely necessary.

Unfortunately, Republicans are listening to their special interest investors instead of the American people and have refused to move this critical bill forward in the Senate.

[**Add your name to demand that Mitch McConnell and the Republicans in the Senate stop hurting our democracy by blocking the _For the People Act_ :**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/101138b5/622b7b5b/1104a0fc/307aa0bb/3025336045/VEsE/?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://sign.actiontaker.org/HR1-Anniversary-DWS?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+to+demand+that+Mitch+McCon&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_IA_200310_1_2&source=DWS_EM_JA_IA_200310_1_2&refcode=DWS_EM_JA_IA_200310_1_2")

[RESTORE DEMOCRACY](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/101138b5/622b7b5b/1104a0fc/307aa0ba/3025336045/VEsF/?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://sign.actiontaker.org/HR1-Anniversary-DWS?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=3+-+RESTORE+DEMOCRACY&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_IA_200310_1_2&source=DWS_EM_JA_IA_200310_1_2&refcode=DWS_EM_JA_IA_200310_1_2")
The _For the People Act_ would require transparent disclosure of big-money contributors, institute a matching system for small donations, and more tightly regulate Super PACs.

Just as important, this legislation protects voting rights, ends partisan gerrymandering, and stops voter roll purges.

[**Sign here to demand that the Senate stop blocking the broadly popular _For the People Act_!**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/101138b5/622b7b5b/1104a0fc/307aa0bd/3025336045/VEsC/?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://sign.actiontaker.org/HR1-Anniversary-DWS?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=4+-+Sign+here+to+demand+that+the+Senate+stop&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_IA_200310_1_2&source=DWS_EM_JA_IA_200310_1_2&refcode=DWS_EM_JA_IA_200310_1_2")

Thank you for all that you do.

Debbie

---

Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com
To unsubscribe, go to:
[https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/101138b5/622b7b5b/1104a0fc/307aa0bc/3025336045/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "http://action.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=5+-+httpssecuredebbiewassermanschultzcomunsu&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_IA_200310_1_2&source=DWS_EM_JA_IA_200310_1_2&refcode=DWS_EM_JA_IA_200310_1_2")
